name: HMC SA Administradora General De Fondos - Fondo de Inversion HMC Balanceado Global Fund
summary: HMC SA Administradora General De Fondos - Fondo de Inversion HMC Balanceado Global Fund is a globally diversified balanced fund. It is managed by HMC SA Administradora General De Fondos. The fund invests in a mix of asset classes, including equities and fixed income, to achieve a balance between growth and risk.
